level.setting: A chaotic, collapsing airship assembly yard with loose gears, venting steam, and swinging crane hooks

encounters.hazard: Uncontrolled venting steam pipes

pickup.name: Insulated Copper Wire
pickup.effect: Reduces incoming electrical damage by 50%

encounters.trigger: A massive boiler explosion blasts open the heavy iron doors leading to the smelting room

encounters.hazard: Spilling cauldrons of molten brass

pickup.name: Acidic Boiler Descaler
pickup.effect: Dissolves heavy metals and adhesive sealants on contact

encounters.trigger: The floor of the smelting room collapses, dropping the player into the lower engine bay

encounters.hazard: Rapidly spinning exposed gears

pickup.name: Supercharged Magneto Coil
pickup.effect: Emits a high-frequency electromagnetic pulse when struck

encounters.trigger: The main pressure valve blows, initiating a self-destruction sequence in the Captain's bridge above

boss.name: Dreadnought Engine Core MK-IV
boss.victory_condition: Overload the core's cooling vents using the coil, then rupture the main cylinder with the Pneumatic Rivet Gun

level.objective: Navigate the collapsing factory, disable the rampaging automatons, and shut down the haywire Dreadnought Engine before it explodes
level.reward: The Master Engineer's Golden Wrench and blueprints for the prototype Aether-thruster

level.setting: The Whispering Gearworks, a subterranean automated clockwork factory shrouded in perpetual steam and ticking shadows.

encounters.hazard: Searing steam vents bursting from ruptured copper pipes.

pickup.name: Solder-Acid Canister
pickup.effect: Corrodes reinforced metallic armor plating on impact.

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the Watcher's core causes a pressure overload, blowing open the sealed hatchway to the Assembly Line.

encounters.hazard: Heavy automated stamping presses crashing down rhythmically.

pickup.name: Polarized Magnet Dynamo
pickup.effect: Emits a strong electromagnetic pulse when struck by kinetic energy.

encounters.trigger: The Scrapsmith's defeat triggers an emergency shutdown sequence, halting the assembly line but activating the high-voltage Smelting Pit.

encounters.hazard: Rising pools of molten copper flowing beneath grated iron walkways.

pickup.name: Insulated Copper Conduit
pickup.effect: Channels and neutralizes extreme high-voltage electrical current.

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Shock-Sentry overloads the local power grid, sparking a lift platform that descends into the Arch-Architect's Sanctum.

boss.name: The Great Chronometer
boss.victory_condition: Redirect the Chronometer's lightning-fast tesla discharges back into its exposed central pendulum using the Insulated Copper Conduit.

level.objective: Navigate the labyrinthine automated factory to disable the rogue Chronometer and stop the city's clocks from ticking backward.
level.reward: The Master-Key Gearwheel, allowing access to the grand archives, and the schematics for the Chrono-Disruptor.

level.setting: The Clockwork Greenhouse of Baron von Fluff

encounters.hazard: Leaky Copper Steam Pipes

pickup.name: Sticky Honey-Syrup Elixir
pickup.effect: Slows down fast-moving mechanical gears

encounters.trigger: A secret hatch opens in the brass floor, revealing the path down to the gear-works.

encounters.hazard: Slippery Algae-Coated Walkways

pickup.name: Conductive Copper-Dust Powder
pickup.effect: Greatly amplifies electrical currents when wet

encounters.trigger: An automated steam elevator activates, lifting the player up to the upper canopy.

encounters.hazard: Intense Focused Sun-Beams

pickup.name: Super-Chilled Liquid Nitrogen Bulb
pickup.effect: Instantly freezes and cracks overheated metal armor

encounters.trigger: The glass dome ceiling retracts, exposing the main control airship docks for the final battle.

boss.name: The Steam-Powered Brass Over-Gardener
boss.victory_condition: Freeze the boiler core using the Liquid Nitrogen Bulb, causing the mechanism to harmlessly lock up and self-disable.

level.objective: Deactivate the malfunctioning Clockwork Greenhouse systems before they over-fertilize the entire city with sticky spore-dust.
level.reward: The Master Alchemist's Golden Cogwheel badge and an endless supply of glowing glow-flower seeds.

level.setting: The Clanking Undercroft of New London, a subterranean maze of hiss-venting brass pipes and churning iron gears.

encounters.hazard: Ruptured high-pressure steam pipes shooting boiling vapor at regular intervals

pickup.name: Corrosive Acid Phial
pickup.effect: Melts heavy metals and lubricates rusted locks when thrown

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the acid triggers an alarm, releasing toxic smog that forces the player down into the lower filtration shaft

encounters.hazard: Grinding gear teeth and shifting walkways slick with grease

pickup.name: Overloaded Tesla Capacitor
pickup.effect: Releases a high-voltage electrical discharge when shattered

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentry causes its central core to detonate, collapsing the floor and dropping the player into the generator depths

encounters.hazard: Uninsulated copper cables sparking high-voltage currents across the metal floor

pickup.name: Magnetic Disruption Core
pickup.effect: Creates a localized electromagnetic pulse when detonated

encounters.trigger: Plucking the core causes the generator to overload, opening the secure blast doors leading directly to the Grand Engine Sanctum

boss.name: The Clockwork Golem Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Detonate the Magnetic Disruption Core inside the Golem's open chest plate while dodging its massive gear fists.

level.objective: Navigate the dangerous undercroft, disable the automated defenses, and destroy the Golem Overlord to stop the city's self-destruction protocol.
level.reward: The Master Clockmaker's skeleton key, which unlocks the Grand Archives, and 1000 brass sovereigns.

level.setting: An ominous, soot-choked clockwork factory suspended above an abyss of toxic smog

encounters.location: The Crank and Gear Assembly Line
encounters.hazard: Swinging copper pendulums and bursts of scalding exhaust steam

pickup.name: Condenser Vial of Superheated Oil
pickup.effect: Temporarily coats attacks to cause explosive damage on metallic surfaces

encounters.trigger: A massive copper gate slams shut behind the player, venting high-pressure steam that forces them into the ventilation shafts

encounters.hazard: Giant high-speed exhaust fans that pull players toward rotating blades

pickup.name: Charged Leyden Jar
pickup.effect: Imbues the player with static overcharge, emitting electric pulses when hit

encounters.trigger: The drone crashes into the fan controls, causing an overload that blows the floor out and drops the player into the smelting chamber

encounters.hazard: Overflowing cauldrons spilling molten slag onto the metal grated floor

pickup.name: Aether-Infused Copper Rod
pickup.effect: Acts as a conduit that absorbs and redirects colossal amounts of electrical energy

encounters.trigger: The falling golem crushes the furnace door, exposing the main elevator shaft leading directly to the Grand Clockwork Observatory

boss.name: The Iron Baron's Titan Mech
boss.victory_condition: Channel the factory's storm generator through the Aether-Infused Copper Rod to overload the Titan Mech's core

level.objective: Ascend the ominous clockwork factory to disable the smog-producing storm generator controlled by the Iron Baron.
level.reward: The Core Engine Key, unlocking the next region, and the 'Tempest Engine' passive skill for the Stormcaller class.

level.setting: An abandoned, rust-coated clockwork metropolis perpetual frozen in a twilight haze.

encounters.hazard: Intermittent jets of superheated, pressurized steam from cracked pipes.

pickup.name: Magnetized Chrono-Trigger
pickup.effect: Allows the user to discharge localized electromagnetic pulses.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentry activates a heavy pressure plate, unlocking the gates to the Sunken Boiler Room.

encounters.hazard: Slippery pools of boiling condensation and oil on the metallic floor.

pickup.name: Aetheric Overcharge Capacitor
pickup.effect: Temporarily overloads any machinery with raw, unstable chronal energy.

encounters.trigger: The destruction of the Automaton causes a structural collapse, dropping the player into the Vault Archives.

encounters.hazard: Collapsing bookshelves loaded with heavy brass-bound ledgers and jagged gears.

pickup.name: Singularity Chronometer
pickup.effect: Can freeze a massive object or entity in a localized temporal loop.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Archivist causes the archive's central elevator to ascend automatically toward the Great Observatory.

boss.name: The Great Chronometer Engine
boss.victory_condition: Freeze the central core using the Singularity Chronometer, then shatter the main spring with the Temporal Rift-Scythe.

level.objective: Navigate the desolate ruins of the clockwork city to shut down the malfunctioning Grand Chronometer.
level.reward: The Chronos Core, granting the player permanent control over localized time-dilation fields.

level.setting: An eerie, abandoned mechanical brass refinery submerged in toxic copper smog and haunted by automated constructs.

enemy.name: Smog-Clogged Automaton
enemy.weakness: Crystalline Seismic Scepter (vulnerable to high-frequency vibrational shattering)

encounters.hazard: Searing steam vents bursting from ruptured copper pipes

pickup.name: Flask of Magnetized Mercury
pickup.effect: Converts weapon vibrations into localized magnetic gravity fields

encounters.trigger: A massive boiler door collapses, exposing the flooded pipeline to the Smelting Room

enemy.name: Rust-Coated Welder Drone
enemy.weakness: Flask of Magnetized Mercury (short-circuits when magnetic mercury coats its exposed exhaust ports)

encounters.hazard: Overflowing vats of molten slag that spill across the walkway

pickup.name: Highly Conductive Copper-Dust Granules
pickup.effect: Can be scattered to ground electric currents and amplify kinetic impact

encounters.trigger: An automated alarm triggers, opening the main security vault door

enemy.name: Static-Charged Brass Warden
enemy.weakness: Highly Conductive Copper-Dust Granules (grounds its internal high-voltage battery and overloads its chassis)

encounters.hazard: Swinging pendulum blades coated in toxic grease

pickup.name: Resonating Quartz Core
pickup.effect: Allows the geomancer to manipulate solid metal structures as if they were soft clay

encounters.trigger: The floor of the vault collapses, dropping the player into the master engine chamber where the boss resides

boss.name: The Great Mechanical Leviathan Engine
boss.weakness: Resonating Quartz Core (the core allows the player to liquefy the engine's massive brass load-bearing columns, causing it to crush itself)
boss.victory_condition: Deform all four structural brass pillars using the Resonating Quartz Core to collapse the roof onto the engine's central furnace.

level.objective: Navigate the suffocating, automated brass refinery to deactivate the rogue engine before it triggers a volcanic boiler explosion.
level.reward: The Masterwork Geo-Mechanical Keystone, unlocking control over the city's steam-grid and metal constructs.

level.setting: The Whispering Gardens of Brass, a peaceful botanical conservatory filled with gentle steam mists, mechanical brass butterflies, and glowing glass domes.

encounters.hazard: Leaking thermal steam pipes that release hot bursts at regular intervals.

pickup.name: Insulated Copper Wire
pickup.effect: Increases elemental resistance and can conduct safe currents.

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Insulated Copper Wire into the garden conduit unlocks the mechanical gate leading to the Overgrown Conservatory.

encounters.hazard: Patches of thorny clockwork briars that slow down movement.

pickup.name: Vial of Condensation Oil
pickup.effect: Lubricates rusted gears and acts as a highly flammable solvent.

encounters.trigger: Pouring a drop of Condensation Oil onto the jammed elevator gears activates the platform to descend into the Lilypad Aqueduct.

encounters.hazard: Slippery algae-coated brass walkways near deep water pools.

pickup.name: Purified Solar Core
pickup.effect: Emits a warm, blinding light that overloads light-sensitive optical sensors.

encounters.trigger: Placing the Purified Solar Core into the central pedestal opens the grand doors to the Grand Steam Engine Sanctuary where the boss resides.

boss.name: The Great Brass Clockwork Swan
boss.victory_condition: Expose the Swan's main optical sensor to the Purified Solar Core to blind it, then strike its central core with the Aether-Infused Steam Hammer to safely shut down its systems.

level.objective: Calm the malfunctioning clockwork guardians of the Whispering Gardens and restore peaceful equilibrium to the sanctuary.
level.reward: The Aegis of Serenity, a legendary steampunk paladin shield that absorbs steam energy to heal allies.

level.setting: The Abyssal Trench of Luminescent Coral

encounters.hazard: Scalding sulfuric geysers that erupt periodically, reducing visibility and dealing damage.

pickup.name: Chipped Prism Shard
pickup.effect: Refracts ambient light into a concentrated beam of high-intensity energy.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Obsidian Crustacean causes the tectonic shelf to collapse, dropping the player into the Sunken Gardens.

encounters.hazard: Constricting kelp vines that attempt to drag the player into deep, oxygen-depleted currents.

pickup.name: Vortex Conch
pickup.effect: When blown, creates a localized pressure vortex that can manipulate heavy undersea currents.

encounters.trigger: Using the Vortex Conch to clear the thick kelp barrier reveals the entrance to the Pressure Chamber.

encounters.hazard: Falling cavern debris shaken loose by deep sea earthquakes.

pickup.name: Heart of the Reef
pickup.effect: An ancient, glowing geode that emits a resonant frequency capable of shattering dense fossilized structures.

encounters.trigger: Placing the Heart of the Reef onto the central altar opens the heavy stone portal to the Core of the Trench where the ancient guardian rests.

boss.name: Leviathan of the Earth's Core
boss.victory_condition: Use the resonant frequency of the Heart of the Reef to shatter the Leviathan's protective tectonic armor, then strike its exposed core with the Seafloor Tremor Scepter.

level.objective: Retrieve the ancient Heart of the Reef and defeat the Leviathan to stabilize the undersea tectonic plates.
level.reward: The Title of Tide-Shaper, which unlocks geomantic control over water currents and undersea magma.

encounters.hazard: Thorned Sea Urchins

pickup.name: Sparkling Pearl of Light
pickup.effect: Illuminates dark caves and blinds nocturnal predators

encounters.trigger: A sudden shift in the current opens a passage into the Sunken Grotto, revealing a glowing jellyfish path.

encounters.hazard: Freezing Thermal Vents

pickup.name: Siren Whisper Shell
pickup.effect: Produces high-frequency vibrations that pacify agitated aquatic giants

encounters.trigger: The defeat of the Shadow Eel triggers a soft resonance in the cavern walls, unlocking the entrance to the Crystal Trench.

encounters.hazard: Falling Crystal Shards

pickup.name: Prismatic Algae Serum
pickup.effect: Soothes internal corruption and neutralizes ancient ocean toxins

encounters.trigger: The opening of the giant clam releases a trail of bioluminescent spores leading straight to the heart of the Deep Sanctuary.

boss.name: Goliath Ancient Sea Turtle
boss.victory_condition: Feed the Prismatic Algae Serum to the corrupted ancient turtle to restore its peace and gain its blessing.

level.objective: Gently calm the ancient denizens of the deep and restore balance to the serene aquatic ecosystem.
level.reward: The Ocean Heart Amulet, allowing permanent water breathing and telepathic communication with marine life.

level.setting: The Abyssal Trench of Lost Souls, a dark, freezing ocean floor littered with ancient shipwrecks and glowing, toxic flora.

encounters.hazard: Superheated hydrothermal vents that erupt periodically.

pickup.name: Vial of Black Bile
pickup.effect: Coats weapons in a necrotic acid, melting calcified armor.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Drowned Deserter releases an oily slick of dark magic that flows downward, opening a passage to the Coral Catacombs.

encounters.hazard: Hypnotic spore clouds that invert player movement controls.

pickup.name: Spectral Conch Shell
pickup.effect: Emits a high-frequency spiritual wail that shatters ethereal barriers.

encounters.trigger: The death rattle of the Calcified Siren resonates with the Spectral Conch, shattering a crystalline barrier guarding the Sunken Temple.

encounters.hazard: Sinking debris and falling stone pillars from tectonic tremors.

pickup.name: Abyssal Heart-Stone
pickup.effect: Emits a pulse of pure dark energy that neutralizes ancient protective wards.

encounters.trigger: As the Phantom Diver dissipates, the Abyssal Heart-Stone pulses violently, unlocking the massive obsidian seal of the Abyssal Throne Room.

boss.name: Leviathan's Revenant
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Abyssal Heart-Stone to shatter the Leviathan's glowing chest cavity and pierce its exposed core with the Bone-Shard Harpoon.

level.objective: Navigate the suffocating depths of the Abyssal Trench, reclaim the lost souls of the drowned, and destroy the corrupted Leviathan's Revenant.
level.reward: The Crown of the Deep Tide, granting the player permanent command over undead marine fauna.

level.setting: The Abyssal Trench of Drowned Screams, a high-pressure oceanic void

encounters.hazard: Sinking thermal vents that drain player energy

pickup.name: Condensing Coral Core
pickup.effect: Modifies the Siphon Bolt to unleash chain lightning under high pressure

encounters.trigger: A sudden shift in oceanic pressure reveals a cavern pathway leading deeper into the trench

encounters.location: The Sunken Cathedral of the Deep
encounters.hazard: Falling architectural debris loosened by seismic deep-sea tremors

pickup.name: Electrified Aegis Shell
pickup.effect: Imbues the stormcaller with static armor that shocks attackers when damaged

encounters.trigger: An ancient defense seal shatters, opening a vertical thermal shaft to the deepest hydrothermal vents

encounters.hazard: Blinding black smoke plumes that cause continuous damage over time

pickup.name: Storm-Charged Pearl
pickup.effect: Amplifies electrical output to absolute maximum, bypasses supernatural water resistance

encounters.trigger: The death throes of the behemoth trigger a massive volcanic eruption, forcing the player down into the final abyssal nursery

boss.name: The Kraken Matriarch of the Void
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Storm-Charged Pearl through the Siphon Bolt directly into the Matriarch's open bioluminescent eye maw while dodging her crushing tentacles

level.objective: Navigate the suffocating abyss to seal the deep-sea rift before the ocean is boiled by unstable hydrothermal energy
level.reward: The Crown of Tempestuous Deeps, giving the Stormcaller class permanent underwater agility and hydro-electric damage amplification

level.setting: The Abyssal Trench of Whispering Kelp

encounters.hazard: Corrosive thermal vent plumes

pickup.name: Siren's Phosphor Pearl
pickup.effect: Emits an intense flash of blinding light upon consumption

encounters.trigger: Opening the rusted iron cathedral gate reveals the dark Kelp Forest path.

encounters.hazard: Entangling strangler kelp

pickup.name: Vial of Pure Deep-Sea Toxin
pickup.effect: Coats weapons to melt hard protective shells

encounters.trigger: Cutting through the final thick kelp wall exposes the entrance to the Sunken Galleon.

encounters.hazard: Falling rotten timber and collapsing steel hull plates

pickup.name: Aegis Conch Shell
pickup.effect: Creates a temporary sonic barrier that repels physical mass

encounters.trigger: Defeating the giant crab causes its heavy carcass to crash through the floor, opening the way to the abyssal nest.

boss.name: The Kraken's Phantom
boss.victory_condition: Use the Aegis Conch Shell to deflect the Phantom's crushing tentacle sweep, leaving its glowing core vulnerable to the Shadow-Infused Harpoon.

level.objective: Navigate the suffocating depths of the trench, retrieve the stolen Core of the Depths, and banish the spectral guardian.
level.reward: The legendary Shadow-Tide Cloak, which grants total invisibility in deep water.

level.setting: The Abyssal Trench, a pressurized sub-oceanic fissure filled with superheated hydrothermal vents.

enemy.name: Glacial Barnacle Titan
enemy.weakness: Obsidian Thermal Lance (superheats their frozen shell causing catastrophic pressure release)

encounters.hazard: Scalding acid geysers that erupt on a cycle.

pickup.name: Magnesium Fuel Core
pickup.effect: Modifies the lance to project a chemical flare that burns underwater without oxygen.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Titan causes the thermal crust to fracture, pulling the player into the Sunken Biosphere.

enemy.name: Algae-Bloomed Kelp Terror
enemy.weakness: Magnesium Fuel Core (the chemical flare ignites the high-methane kelp fibers instantly)

encounters.hazard: Drifting spores that distort vision and invert movement controls.

pickup.name: Sonic Vibro-Emitter
pickup.effect: Emits high-frequency sonic pulses that can shatter crystallized structures.

encounters.trigger: The death thrashing of the Kelp Terror breaches the containment wall, flushing the player into the Crystal Trench.

enemy.name: Crystalline Angler Leviathan
enemy.weakness: Sonic Vibro-Emitter (shatters its crystalline defensive armor plating, exposing its soft flesh)

encounters.hazard: Sharp crystal formations falling from the ceiling due to seismic shockwaves.

pickup.name: Concentrated Napalm Catalyst
pickup.effect: Supercharges thermal attacks to create localized, high-pressure magma explosions.

encounters.trigger: The Leviathan crashes into the trench floor as it dies, opening a gateway into the Abyssal Core where the boss resides.

boss.name: Kraken of the Boiling Depths
boss.weakness: Concentrated Napalm Catalyst (ignites the volatile oil glands inside the Kraken's maw, causing massive internal damage)
boss.victory_condition: Destroy the three glowing pressure-valve nodes on its head using the Napalm Catalyst while dodging its chaotic sweeping tentacles.

level.objective: Navigate the unstable underwater depths, utilize highly specialized thermal equipment to survive the aquatic beasts, and neutralize the source of the geothermal instability.
level.reward: The legendary 'Neptunian Flame' core, allowing pyromancy spells to function underwater at 100% efficiency without requiring specialized gear.

level.setting: The Abyssal Trench, a cold, forgotten ocean graveyard littered with rusting submarine hulls and skeletal coral reef structures.

encounters.hazard: Leaking sulfuric acid vents

pickup.name: High-Frequency Sonic Emitter
pickup.effect: Emits a pulse that disrupts internal equilibrium of soft-bodied creatures.

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the sonic emitter activates a distress beacon, attracting predators in the adjacent Kelp Forest.

encounters.hazard: Entangling strangler-kelp currents

pickup.name: Supercharged Magnesium Flare
pickup.effect: Produces an intense, blinding white-hot chemical reaction underwater.

encounters.trigger: The death-screech of the Swarm-Mother collapses the canyon wall, forcing the player down into the Abyssal Thermal Vent.

encounters.hazard: Superheated steam plumes

pickup.name: Depleted Uranium Harpoon Tip
pickup.effect: Significantly increases armor penetration capabilities of the Heavy Pneumatic Harpoon.

encounters.trigger: The defeat of the Leviathan-Spawn breaches the pressure seal of the ancient sunken vault, revealing the Maw of the Ancient One.

boss.name: The Maw of the Ancient One
boss.victory_condition: De-armor and destroy the primary core of the ancient bio-mechanical leviathan.

level.objective: Navigate the desolate trenches to secure the ancient geothermal core before pressure collapse occurs.
level.reward: The Warden's Mark and the Legendary Deep-Sea Aegis Suit upgrade.

encounters.hazard: Floating stinging nettles that drift lazily

pickup.name: Prismatic Conch Shell
pickup.effect: Releases a high-pitched, musical ringing sound when blown

encounters.trigger: A secret tunnel of glowing blue plankton opens up, leading deeper into the reef

encounters.hazard: Sudden upward thermal vents that push the player into sharp coral

pickup.name: Bottle of Glittering Squid Ink
pickup.effect: Creates a dazzling cloud of shimmering silver light

encounters.trigger: The floor of the trench collapses gently, depositing the player onto a bed of soft sea-sponges

encounters.hazard: Spinning carousel wooden seahorses that create unpredictable whirlpools

pickup.name: Golden Kelp Crown
pickup.effect: Empowers magical illusions with absolute, dazzling brilliance

encounters.trigger: The heavy, coral-encrusted gates of the Sea-Shell Palace swing open widely

boss.name: Barnaby, the Dramatic Octopus King
boss.victory_condition: Dazzle Barnaby with the Golden Kelp Crown until he surrenders his crown and begins to dance joyfully

level.objective: Navigate the whimsical depths to find the Coral Scepter and bring laughter back to the reef
level.reward: The Title of Grand Coral Illusionist and a permanent bubbles-trail effect for your character
